title: mcreator modding test
description: a mod i made to test modding in mcreator that includes things such as drills and a laser-sword
body:
# What is the **mcreator modding test** mod?

The **mcreator modding test** mod is a mod that I made in MCreator that includes features such as:

## **Drills**
Drills are stronger versions of pickaxes that have higher durability and breaking speed but are more expensive to craft

## **Storagetest**
Storagetest is a block I made to test guis, storage, and deleting items, you put items in the slots and press the delete button to permanently delete them

## **FEtest** 
FEtest is a block that i made to test fe(Forge energy) storage
